# Code Anchors: Epic Approval Gate

- `.claude/commands/nxs.epic.md` — takes intent directly, right-sizes, presents the decision-grade digest, and on approval files the epic and its story issues together.
- `.claude/skills/nxs-gh-create-epic/` — files the epic GitHub issue from the epic document.
